channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in C++ (Weekly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in C++ nel periodo weekly.

item.title: 📝 loc567/loc567 (798 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: loc567

📝 Repository: loc567/loc567

📄 Descrizione: loc567 是一款完全开源免费的纯网页端iOS模拟定位工具。在线体验地址：https://loc567.com

🍴 Forks: 92

💻 Linguaggio: C

📜 Licenza: GNU Lesser General Public License v2.1

]]>

item.description:

📝 Repository: miunasu/ShadowScheduler

item.title: 📝 MikeWuPing/UEFI_Contra (20 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: MikeWuPing

📝 Repository: MikeWuPing/UEFI_Contra

📄 Descrizione: 这是一个将红白机经典《魂斗罗》（Contra）移植到 **UEFI Shell** 环境的技术实验项目。游戏作为 UEFI 应用程序（.efi 文件）运行，直接通过 GOP（Graphics Output Protocol）渲染画面，无需操作系统支持，仅依赖 UEFI 固件.This project ports the classic NES game **Contra** (魂斗罗) to the **UEFI Shell** environment.

⭐ Stelle: 20

🍴 Forks: 0

💻 Linguaggio: C

📜 Licenza: No license

⏰ Creato il: 2026-06-13T11:14:00Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-06-18T17:18:47Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 📝 overducast/RiftByte (18 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: overducast

📝 Repository: overducast/RiftByte

📄 Descrizione: Binary diff tool for PE (EXE/DLL) and ELF files. Compares two binaries, resolves virtual addresses, decodes x86/x64/ARM instructions, identifies changed sections, and exports a human-readable log and an x64dbg-compatible .1337 patch file. Supports x32, x64, ARM32, ARM64.

⭐ Stelle: 18

🍴 Forks: 1

💻 Linguaggio: C

📜 Licenza: MIT License

item.title: 📝 thelostme/WinIo64-PrivEsc-POC (12 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: thelostme

📝 Repository: thelostme/WinIo64-PrivEsc-POC

📄 Descrizione: WinIo64 physical memory exploit. Locates System EPROCESS, steals System token via direct EPROCESS memory read/write, spawns cmd as SYSTEM.

item.title: 📝 TheTsarDev/XNET (11 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: TheTsarDev

📝 Repository: TheTsarDev/XNET

📄 Descrizione: Secure communications for the original Xbox. XNET provides end-to-end encrypted text chat, voice chat, video chat, and secure file transfer on retail hardware. Built with NXDK, it uses a lightweight content-blind relay architecture and requires no accounts or centralized message storage.

⭐ Stelle: 11

🍴 Forks: 1

💻 Linguaggio: C

🏷️ Topics: encryption homebrew nxdk og-xbox original-xbox xbox xbox-homebrew

📜 Licenza: GNU General Public License v3.0

⏰ Creato il: 2026-06-21T01:18:52Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-06-21T23:24:59Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 📝 Rompass/openc6-bios (11 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: Rompass

📝 Repository: Rompass/openc6-bios

📄 Descrizione: An open-source RISC-V firmware platform for ESP32-C6(8MB Flash). Implements a BIOS/Payload architecture with a custom system call interface (ABI), independent LP-Core coprocessor management, and an anti-brick A/B OTA system.

⭐ Stelle: 11

🍴 Forks: 1

💻 Linguaggio: C

🏷️ Topics: bios bootloader embedded esp-idf esp32-c6 firmware riscv

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-06-15T14:02:56Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-06-21T00:07:50Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 📝 francoataffarel/ActRemoteLink (10 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: francoataffarel

📝 Repository: francoataffarel/ActRemoteLink

📄 Descrizione: ActRemoteLink is a utility suite for PS5 workflows. It enables offline local account activation and Chiaki/Remote Play. Key features include changing account IDs offline, generating Remote Play PINs via system notifications, and monitoring successful pairing using a Python sender script to orchestrate the ELF payloads.

⭐ Stelle: 10

🍴 Forks: 1

💻 Linguaggio: C

📜 Licenza: No license

⏰ Creato il: 2026-06-19T15:58:57Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-06-21T18:32:00Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>
